top_signals.title: Takaichi to skip NATO summit in July
top_signals.summary: Since Russia began invading Ukraine in 2022, NATO has invited Japan's leader to attend its summits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starmer risks clash with Burnham over defence funding plan
top_signals.summary: Likely successor to prime minister wants to review long-awaited military investment plan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks are falling in response
top_signals.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction market platform, internally known as "Arena."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI memory startup focused on cutting token costs raises $98 million
top_signals.summary: Engram enters the market as the AI industry grapples with a rising cost problem fueled by more expensive models.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
